data.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 2 (BASIC). Severity=1, Complexity=1, Environment=0. Bug is clear: get_artifacts_dir() hashes REPO_ROOT, and sub-agent worktree has different REPO_ROOT than orchestrator, causing reviewer-findings.json to land in different /tmp dir. Fix options: (1) --findings-file arg to record-review.sh, (2) set WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR in dispatch. Proceeding with BASIC investigation.
